EmailTemplate.description: Recap email sent to Queue after creation of work together process
EmailTemplate.name: Work Together Process - New
EmailTemplate.subject: New {!Case.RecordType}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear All,
A new Work Together Process {!Case.RecordType} has been created by {!Case.CreatedBy} on {!Case.CreatedDate}.
The request subject is : "{!Case.Subject}" for the Company : "{!Account.Name}"
To access the full information, please click on this link : https://carmignac-crm.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Case/{!Case.Id}/view
Kind regards,
This email is automatically generated. Please do not respond to this email.
